name: weixin-codex-bridge
description: Standalone Weixin to Codex bridge without OpenClaw routing

scripts.public-check: node -e "const cp=require('node:child_process'); const candidates=process.platform==='win32'?[process.env.GIT_BASH,'C:/Program Files/Git/bin/bash.exe','C:/Program Files (x86)/Git/bin/bash.exe','bash'].filter(Boolean):['bash']; for (const cmd of candidates){const r=cp.spawnSync(cmd,['./scripts/public-check.sh'],{stdio:'inherit'}); if(!r.error) process.exit(r.status ?? 0); if(r.error.code!=='ENOENT'){console.error(r.error.message); process.exit(1);}} console.error('Unable to find bash. Install Git Bash or run scripts/public-check.sh from a bash shell.'); process.exit(127);"
